title: Product sync — 2026-01-13
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-01-13
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- Ferns & Co escalated Real-time Collaboration problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'SSO/SAML support' across accounts.
- Eng notes Real-time Collaboration generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'SSO/SAML support' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate Real-time Collaboration performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with Ferns & Co.
